body: 新增競品 IntraBio levacetylleucine（CACNA1A／含 SCA6，Ph3 NCT07221292，主要指標 SARA），同步登錄至競品全景、臨床試驗雷達與公司情報卡；另新增 6 則科學文獻（SCA8 表現型與 RAN 轉譯機制、幹細胞試驗轉譯準備度查核表、SCA27B 認知與 PET、SCA1 異構物脆弱性、中國南北 SCA 亞型分布）。

en.body: Added a new competitor, IntraBio levacetylleucine (CACNA1A incl. SCA6, Ph3 NCT07221292, primary endpoint SARA), registered across the competitor landscape, trial radar and company card; plus 6 scientific papers (SCA8 phenotype and RAN translation, a translational-readiness checklist for stem-cell trials, SCA27B cognition and PET, SCA1 isoform vulnerability, north-vs-south China SCA subtype distribution).

body: 新增 1 則科學文獻（SCA1〔ATXN1〕交互作用夥伴 Capicua 之異構物功能分化與小腦選擇性脆弱機制）。

en.body: Added 1 scientific paper (functional divergence of Capicua isoforms, an ATXN1/SCA1 interaction partner, and the mechanism of selective cerebellar vulnerability).

body: 新增 1 則科學文獻（SCA27B〔FGF14 GAA 重複〕之診斷挑戰綜述）。

en.body: Added 1 scientific paper (review of the diagnostic challenges of SCA27B, the FGF14 GAA repeat subtype).

body: 新增追蹤競品 Cure Rare Disease CRD-002（SCA3，單股 ASO，非營利開發）：FDA 孤兒藥資格 2025/05、IND 預計 2026、技術源自 LUMC（與 Vico 同源）。已納入競品全景、臨床開發進度與市場獨占權雷達。

en.body: Added Cure Rare Disease CRD-002 to the tracked competitors (SCA3, single-stranded ASO, non-profit developer): FDA orphan drug designation 2025/05, IND expected 2026, technology from LUMC (the same origin as Vico’s). Now included in the landscape, pipeline and market-exclusivity radars.

body: 新增 3 則科學文獻（遺傳性小腦萎縮症自體骨髓 MSC Ph1/2a 臨床＝MSC 競品訊號、SCA36 NOP56 致病機制、SCA3 連結體神經調控標的）。

en.body: Added 3 scientific papers (autologous bone-marrow MSC Ph1/2a in hereditary cerebellar ataxia = an MSC competitor signal; NOP56 pathogenesis in SCA36; connectome-based neuromodulation targets in SCA3).

body: 新增競品 Arrowhead ARO-ATXN2（SCA2，siRNA，站點含台北榮總）；更正 Biogen 追蹤標的 BIIB105（ATXN2／ALS 案）→ BIIB132（SCA3 ASO，2023 放棄）。掃描邏輯升級為主動發現清單外的新 SCA 療法。

en.body: Added competitor Arrowhead ARO-ATXN2 (SCA2, siRNA, sites include Taipei Veterans General Hospital); corrected the Biogen programme tracked from BIIB105 (ATXN2/ALS) to BIIB132 (SCA3 ASO, discontinued 2023). Scan logic upgraded to actively discover SCA therapies outside the existing list.

body: 新增 2 則科學文獻（SCA 免疫活化與膠細胞失能之免疫調節綜述、SCA 基因療法綜述）。

en.body: Added 2 scientific papers (review of immune activation and glial dysfunction with immunomodulation in SCA; review of gene therapy for SCA).

body: 新增 2 則科學文獻（SCA27B 病人 iPSC 細胞株、SCA3 twin prime editing 基因編輯優化）。

en.body: Added 2 scientific papers (patient-derived iPSC lines for SCA27B; optimisation of twin prime editing in SCA3).

body: 新增 2 則科學文獻（SCA3 小鼠 MSC 實驗、ATXN3 生物標記追蹤）。

en.body: Added 2 scientific papers (MSC experiment in SCA3 mice; ATXN3 biomarker tracking).

body: SCA-IQ 平台自動化正式啟用：每日排程掃描 ClinicalTrials.gov／PubMed／產業新聞，AI 判讀後直接更新本平台；每週一額外產出週報 email 草稿供人工審閱後寄送。

en.body: SCA-IQ automation went live: a daily scheduled scan of ClinicalTrials.gov, PubMed and trade press, with AI triage writing straight into this platform; every Monday it additionally drafts a weekly email digest for human review before sending.
